login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue working on your applications.
login.rateLimitToast: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.
login.oauthInviteRequiredToast: Applo is currently in closed beta. Please sign up with your invite code first — then you can connect Google / Microsoft in settings.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Start with Applo and keep every application under control.
register.betaNote: Applo is currently in closed beta. You need an invite code to sign up.
register.captchaRequiredToast: Please complete the CAPTCHA below first. If it does not appear, briefly disable tracking protection / your ad blocker for this page.
register.captchaFailedToast: Bot protection failed. Please complete the CAPTCHA again. If it does not appear, briefly disable tracking protection or your ad blocker for this page.
register.inviteCodeRequiredToast: Applo is currently in closed beta. Please enter your invite code.
register.inviteCodeInvalidToast: This invite code is invalid. Please check the spelling.
register.inviteCodeUsedToast: This invite code has already been redeemed.
register.emailExistsToast: This email address is already registered.
register.rateLimitToast: Too many sign-up attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.

mascot.loginTagline: Your applications, organized like a system instead of chaos.
mascot.registerTagline: Join the closed beta and make applying predictable.
mascot.passwordHint: Focus the password field — Applo looks away

forgotPassword.speechFocused: No problem — I'll help you get back in.
forgotPassword.speechIdle: Forgot your password? Happens to everyone.
forgotPassword.tagline: No problem — we'll get you back in shortly.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for this email address, you will receive a password reset link shortly. Please also check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

resetPassword.invalidTokenError: The link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.genericErrorToast: Something went wrong. Please try again.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password was changed successfully. You will be redirected to the sign-in page shortly.
resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password. Choose a secure password you have not used before.

verifyEmail.invalidTokenError: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email address has been verified successfully.

emailVerificationBanner.successToast: Verification email was sent! Please check your inbox.
emailVerificationBanner.rateLimitToast: Please wait a moment before requesting another email.
emailVerificationBanner.alreadyVerifiedToast: Your email address has already been verified.
emailVerificationBanner.genericErrorToast: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
emailVerificationBanner.title: Please verify your email address.
